LanguageData.VGE_CompactDrugLab.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered drug lab designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its sEinkaufszentrumer frame, it’s equipped with containers, heaters, and measurement devices for producing various drugs. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactDrugLab.label: kompaktes Arzneimittellabor
LanguageData.VGE_CompactFabBench.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered fabrication bench designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its sEinkaufszentrumer frame, it’s equipped with advanced tools for producing technological marvels from simpler materials. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactFabBench.label: Kompakte Fertigungsbank
LanguageData.VGE_CompactMachiningTable.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered machining table designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its sEinkaufszentrumer frame, it’s ideal for assembling machinery like guns and ammunition, or breaking down dead mechanoids. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactMachiningTable.label: kompakter Bearbeitungstisch
LanguageData.VGE_CompactRefinery.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered biofuel refinery designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its sEinkaufszentrumer frame, it refines biological matter like wood or plant matter into chemfuel. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactRefinery.label: kompakte Biokraftstoffraffinerie
LanguageData.VGE_CompactSmithy.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered smithy designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its sEinkaufszentrumer frame, it can be used to smith non-mechanical weapons and tools, as well as extract usable metal from slag chunks. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactSmithy.label: kompakte Schmiede
LanguageData.VGE_CompactStove.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered stove designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its sEinkaufszentrumer frame, it contains a high-efficiency cooktop and integrated prep surface, as well as a butchering slate. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactStove.label: kompakter Herd
LanguageData.VGE_CompactTailor.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered tailor bench designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its sEinkaufszentrumer frame, this workbench comes with a sewing machine for rapid tailoring of clothes. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactTailor.label: kompakte Schneiderbank
LanguageData.VGE_WallToolCabinet.description: A wall-mounted version of a tool cabinet. Increases work speed when placed near a workbench. One workbench can use up to two tool cabinets.
LanguageData.VGE_WallToolCabinet.label: wall tool cabinet
